title: Hello! I'm Kathrina
subtitle: Your future Spanish teacher
intro1: Welcome to my teaching space! I'm from Colombia, a native Spanish speaker with over 5 years of experience helping students of all ages - from 3-year-old children to adults - learn and enjoy the Spanish language.
intro2: My classes are taught live via Zoom, allowing you to learn comfortably from anywhere in the world.
intro3: In my lessons, you will learn Spanish in a structured yet natural way, with a strong focus on practical fluency from day one.
approach: I combine the spontaneity of natural conversation with the academic structure needed to truly master the language. I work with teaching materials tailored to your level and goals, ensuring a learning experience that is effective, engaging, and professional.
benefits: Experience teaching students from diverse cultures and age groups
Personalized lessons tailored to your pace and learning style
Strong focus on pronunciation and correct usage
Ongoing support to help you progress with confidence
Convenient live classes via Zoom - learn from anywhere
expectations: Start reading in Spanish from the very beginning
Apply pronunciation rules from the first lesson
Gradually begin to think in Spanish
Hold a basic conversation within two weeks
Learn grammar progressively so it sticks naturally
Get plenty of practice - visual, auditory, written, and spoken
